name: TPC Benchmarks: Users Benefit From Competition (1992 Presentation Notes)
description: Outline and notes for a 1992 Aberdeen Group presentation on TPC benchmarks covering TPC-A and TPC-B standards and their role as the primary vehicle for commercial system price/performance competition. Per-supplier analysis covers Digital (VAX), HP, IBM (RS/6000, AS/400, mainframes), Bull, Data General, and Sun, with specific data points including HP's Jan-1990 cost of $36.50/TPS-A falling to DEC's $7.69/TPS-A by March 1992, and Digital VAX 4000-300 improving price-performance by 50% over 18 months.
